title: [FIRRTL] CHIRRTL lowering not updating NLAs
body:
related to: https://github.com/llvm/circt/issues/2526
There are two problems:
1. Memory ports are not being assigned `inner_sym` for use in an NLA
2. During LowerCHIRRTL, the NLA needs to be updated to target the memory. It still points to the non-existent port declaration afterwords.

The following test

```
circuit Top: %[[ {"class":"test","target":"~Top|Top/test:Test>myport"}]]
  module Test:
    input p: UInt<1>
    input addr: UInt<4>
    input clock: Clock
    output out: UInt<8>

    cmem mymem : UInt<8>[16]
    node n = addr
    when p:
      read mport myport = mymem[n], clock
    out <= myport

  module Top:
    inst test of Test
```
```mlir
// ./bin/firtool --parse-only  ./test.fir
  firrtl.circuit "Top"   {
    firrtl.nla @nla_1 [#hw.innerNameRef<@Top::@test>, #hw.innerNameRef<@Test::@myport>]
    firrtl.module @Test(in %p: !firrtl.uint<1>, in %addr: !firrtl.uint<4>, in %clock: !firrtl.clock, out %out: !firrtl.uint<8>) {
      %mymem = chirrtl.combmem  : !chirrtl.cmemory<uint<8>, 16>
      %myport_data, %myport_port = chirrtl.memoryport Read %mymem  {annotations = [{circt.nonlocal = @nla_1, class = "test"}], name = "myport"} : (!chirrtl.cmemory<uint<8>, 16>) -> (!firrtl.uint<8>, !chirrtl.cmemoryport)
      %n = firrtl.node %addr  : !firrtl.uint<4>
      firrtl.when %p  {
        chirrtl.memoryport.access %myport_port[%n], %clock : !chirrtl.cmemoryport, !firrtl.uint<4>, !firrtl.clock
      }
      firrtl.connect %out, %myport_data : !firrtl.uint<8>, !firrtl.uint<8>
    }
    firrtl.module @Top() {
      %test_p, %test_addr, %test_clock, %test_out = firrtl.instance test sym @test  {annotations = [{circt.nonlocal = @nla_1, class = "circt.nonlocal"}]} @Test(in p: !firrtl.uint<1>, in addr: !firrtl.uint<4>, in clock: !firrtl.clock, out out: !firrtl.uint<8>)
    }
  }
```

After lowering CHIRRTL, the NLA is still referencing the `@myport` which no longer exists. 
```mlir
firrtl.nla @nla_1 [#hw.innerNameRef<@Top::@test>, #hw.innerNameRef<@Test::@myport>]
firrtl.module @Test(in %p: !firrtl.uint<1>, in %addr: !firrtl.uint<4>, in %clock: !firrtl.clock, out %out: !firrtl.uint<8>) {
  ...
  %mymem_myport = firrtl.mem Undefined  {depth = 16 : i64, name = "mymem", portAnnotations = [[{circt.nonlocal = @nla_1, class = "test"}]], portNames = ["myport"], readLatency = 0 : i32, writeLatency = 1 : i32} : !firrtl.bundle<addr: uint<4>, en: uint<1>, clk: clock, data flip: uint<8>>
  ...
}
```
